brief: Extend existing brix.math Int utilities. Add total pure helpers that compile with current Int `/` (truncating): `fn quot(a: Int, b: Int) -> Int = a / b` only if you can keep it total without division-by-zero — if the toolchain has no zero-guard, skip quot and instead add `fn square(x: Int) -> Int = x * x`, `fn cube(x: Int) -> Int = x * x * x`, `fn mid(a: Int, b: Int) -> Int = (a + b) / 2`. Exact `fn`/`=` syntax. Do not remove existing decls. No Decimal/units/mod. Host formats after check.
